evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based customer support chatbot using OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, GPT-4, and fine-tuned models
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system. Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Deployment of RAG chatbot cut average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% by evolving search ranking from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank
Acted as de-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets for recommendation systems
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in various ML tools including PyTorch, Kubeflow, BM25, and Milvus
evidence.source_text: Skills: ... PyTorch (expert), BM25 (expert), Kubeflow (intermediate), RAG (advanced), Milvus (advanced)

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation frameworks using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.
